title: Trade log and signal feed panels
acceptance_criteria: TradeLog.tsx: renders open and closed trades from TanStack Query (getTrades with status and date filters); filter controls: status dropdown (all/open/closed), personality dropdown (all + each name), date picker; columns: personality, entry time (IST), ATM strike, entry straddle value, exit straddle value (if closed), net P&L ₹, exit reason; 30s refetch; max 100 rows displayed
TradeLog updates instantly when trade_open or trade_close WS message arrives (invalidates TanStack Query cache for trades)

SignalFeed.tsx: renders last 20 signals from Zustand recentSignals (WS-fed); each card shows: signal time (IST), ATM strike, probability, confidence tier badge (HIGH=green, MEDIUM=amber, LOW=grey), expansion_pct
SignalFeed also shows a 'No signals today' placeholder when empty
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
